creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have never seen this.  Are you sure it is not a poudriere bug (which
I assume some tool to test a port)?  Can you, please, verify that it
happens when installing from port as well?

Thanks.

-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE

()  ascii ribbon campaign - against html e-mail 
/\  www.asciiribbon.org   - against proprietary attachments
